backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a loyalty system backend with user authentication, customer points management, and offers CRUD operations. Exposes shared async functions for login, adding points, managing offers, and redeeming rewards.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (auth, dashboard, add customer, QR scanner, etc.) to their corresponding frontend source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key details of every component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, charts, and UI primitives.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'ChickNGo' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application entry defining TanStack Router routes with named protected-route wrapper components (e.g., ProtectedDashboard) to safely call useAuth hooks, wrapped in AuthProvider.
Shared admin shell component providing a dark sidebar with orange-accented navigation links, a responsive mobile drawer overlay, top navbar with menu toggle, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Simple route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /login, otherwise rendering its children.
frontend/src/components/QRCardPreview.ts: Renders a styled QR loyalty card for a customer using an external QR code API, with buttons to print the card in a new window or download the QR image.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context with login/logout functionality, 30-minute session timeout tracking via sessionStorage, and admin initialization on first load.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend offer CRUD operations and a localStorage-based customer/scan management system including point tracking and customer ID generation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles, Tailwind directives, and CSS custom properties for the ChickNGo brand theme including light/dark mode color tokens, sidebar styles, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddCustomer.tsx: Page component for registering a new loyalty customer with name and mobile inputs, client-side validation, and a success state that displays customer details and a QR card preview.
frontend/src/pages/Customers.tsx: Page that lists all registered customers in a paginated, searchable table showing name, mobile, points, QR code, and join date.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying stat cards (total customers, today's scans, total points) and a recent customers list, pulling data from multiple query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Admin login page with username/password form, session-timeout alert, error handling, and redirect to dashboard on successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: Page for managing loyalty offers, supporting creation via a dialog form and deletion via a confirmation dialog, with a table listing all active offers.
frontend/src/pages/ScanQR.tsx: React page for scanning customer QR codes using a camera; on a successful scan it looks up the customer locally and allows staff to add 10 loyalty points via a mutation, with toast notifications for success/failure.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark-mode support, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (brand orange, sidebar, success, warning, chart colors), extended border radii, box shadows, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for ChickNGo, a QR-based chicken shop loyalty system; records the tech stack (Core PHP, MySQL, Vanilla JS), architectural notes, existing feature list, known issues, and image requirements.
